text: 🇷🇺 Russia's Central Bank lowered the key rate to 14.5% from 15% per annum. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 俄罗斯央行将基准利率从年化15%下调至14.5%。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Macron says he won’t stay in politics after 2027: I didn’t do politics before, I won’t do it after.
text_zh: 马克龙表示2027年后他将不再从政：我以前没搞过政治，以后也不会。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇩 🇱🇧 UNIFIL announced that an Indonesian peacekeeper, Corporal Rico Pramudia, has died of injuries sustained in a projectile explosion at his base in Adchit Al Qusayr on 29 March. The 31‑year‑old succumbed to his wounds at a hospital in Beirut. UNIFIL demanded that all actors uphold their obligations under international law and ensure the safety of UN personnel. Deliberate attacks on peacekeepers are grave violations of international humanitarian law and Security Council Resolution 1701, and may amount to war crimes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇮🇩 🇱🇧 联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）宣布，一名印尼维和人员Rico Pramudia下士因3月29日在阿德奇特-库赛尔（Adchit Al Qusayr）基地发生的炮弹爆炸中受伤，最终不治身亡。这名31岁的维和人员在贝鲁特的一家医院伤重不治。联黎部队要求所有相关方履行国际法义务，确保联合国人员的安全。蓄意攻击维和人员是严重违反国际人道法和安理会第1701号决议的行为，可能构成战争罪。@wfwitness

text: China has blocked exports of “dual-use” goods (civilian and military) to seven European companies, including Germany’s Hensoldt and Belgium’s FN Browning, citing their links to Taiwan arms cooperation. The ban also stops third parties from re-exporting Chinese components to these firms.
text_zh: 中国已禁止向七家欧洲公司出口“军民两用”商品，其中包括德国的亨索尔特（Hensoldt）和比利时的FN勃朗宁（FN Browning），理由是它们与台湾有武器合作关系。该禁令还禁止第三方将中国零部件转口给这些公司。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇰🇲 🇮🇷 Reuters: The oil tanker HELGA, sailing under the flag of Comoros, has arrived at one of the offshore oil loading terminals in Iraq's southern Basra port to load 2 million barrels of crude. The vessel is the second tanker to reach Basra's southern offshore terminals since the closure of the Strait of Hormuz during the Iran war, with the Malta-flagged tanker Agios Fanourios I being the first to load about 2 million barrels of Basra crude earlier this month. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇰🇲 🇮🇷 路透社：悬挂科摩罗国旗的油轮“HELGA”号已抵达伊拉克南部巴士拉港的一个海上石油装载终端，准备装载200万桶原油。这是自伊朗战争期间霍尔木兹海峡关闭以来，第二艘抵达巴士拉南部海上终端的油轮。本月早些时候，悬挂马耳他国旗的“Agios Fanourios I”号油轮是第一艘装载约200万桶巴士拉原油的油轮。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Three US aircraft carriers operating simultaneously in West Asia for the first time in decades — CENTCOM 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 数十年来首次有三艘美国航空母舰同时在西亚地区行动 — 中央司令部 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇨🇳🇯🇵 Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Guo Jiakun has strongly condemned Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's visits to the Yasukuni shrine, calling the moves "a blatant provocation against international justice." Guo said Japan has "refused to…" ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Asked whether Chinese diplomacy played a role in the extension of the US-Iran ceasefire, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Guo Jiakun said China supports all political and diplomatic efforts to achieve "a full and lasting ceasefire" in the Middle East, and stands ready to play "an active and constructive role." Separately, asked about Trump's suggestion that a US-intercepted Iranian vessel may have carried a "gift from China," Guo said China "has always been a role model in performing its due international obligations" and declined to elaborate further. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇨🇳🇯🇵 中国外交部发言人郭家坤强烈谴责日本首相高市早苗参拜靖国神社，称此举是‘对国际正义的公然挑衅’。郭表示，日本‘拒绝……’” ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 在被问及中国外交在延长美伊停火协议中是否发挥了作用时，中国外交部发言人郭家坤表示，中国支持所有旨在实现中东“全面持久停火”的政治和外交努力，并随时准备发挥“积极和建设性的作用”。另外，在被问及特朗普关于美国拦截的一艘伊朗船只可能载有“来自中国的礼物”的说法时，郭表示，中国“在履行应尽的国际义务方面一直是典范”，并拒绝进一步置评。@wfwitness

text: Pope Leo XIV on migration: I would change the question: what is the Global North doing to help the Global South in the situation that forces them to migrate?
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世谈移民问题：我会改变这个问题：全球北方国家在帮助全球南方国家解决迫使他们移民的局势方面做了什么？

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 Chinese Foreign Ministry spokesperson Guo Jiakun has strongly condemned Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's visits to the Yasukuni shrine, calling the moves "a blatant provocation against international justice." Guo said Japan has "refused to acknowledge its history of aggression" and warned that recent Japanese government actions on Taiwan and historical issues have had a "grave impact" on China-Japan relations. He added that Japanese neo-militarism is "spreading rapidly and dangerously" and "already a reality that poses real threats to the world," saying countries in the region "must not allow Japanese militarism to be revived nor allow the tragedies of history to be repeated." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇯🇵 中国外交部发言人郭家坤强烈谴责日本首相高市早苗参拜靖国神社，称此举是“对国际正义的公然挑衅”。郭表示，日本“拒绝承认其侵略历史”，并警告称日本政府近期在台湾问题和历史问题上的行动对中日关系产生了“严重影响”。他补充说，日本新军国主义正在“迅速且危险地蔓延”，并且“已经成为对世界构成现实威胁的现实”，并表示该地区国家“绝不允许日本军国主义复活，也不允许历史悲剧重演”。@wfwitness

text: Pakistan’s capital, Islamabad, remains under strict lockdown for a second week as authorities await possible U.S.-Iran peace talks that have yet to materialize. Key roads are closed, public transport is suspended, and markets are struggling with shortages as supply trucks are held outside the city. Officials say security measures will stay in place in case delegations — potentially including Trump — arrive on short notice. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 巴基斯坦首都伊斯兰堡已连续第二周处于严格封锁状态，当局仍在等待可能举行但尚未实现的美伊和平谈判。主要道路被封闭，公共交通暂停，由于供应卡车被阻挡在城外，市场正面临短缺。官员们表示，安保措施将继续实施，以防代表团（可能包括特朗普）在短时间内抵达。来源：路透社

text: Trump’s aggressive public statements and social media posts about Iran are making already fragile peace talks harder to advance. His threats are seen by Iranian officials as humiliating, which reduces their willingness to negotiate. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 特朗普关于伊朗的激进公开言论和社交媒体帖子正使本已脆弱的和平谈判更难推进。伊朗官员认为他的威胁具有羞辱性，这降低了他们的谈判意愿。来源：彭博社

text: Pope Leo XIV: I condemn all actions that are unjust. I condemn the taking of people’s lives. I condemn capital punishment. I believe that human lives are to be respected.
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世：我谴责一切不公正的行为。我谴责剥夺他人生命的行为。我谴责死刑。我相信人的生命应当受到尊重。

text: Pope Leo XIV: There is an entire population in Iran of innocent people who are suffering because of this war.
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世：伊朗有整整一群无辜的人民正因这场战争而受苦。

text: Pope Leo XIV: I carry in my pocket the image of a Muslim child killed in Lebanon… I cannot be in favor of war.
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世：我的口袋里装着一张在黎巴嫩遇难的穆斯林儿童的照片……我无法支持战争。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The USS George H.W. Bush has arrived in the US Central Command area of responsibility, CENTCOM announces. For the first time in decades, three aircraft carriers – the USS Abraham Lincoln, USS Gerald R. Ford and USS George H.W. Bush – are operating simultaneously in the Middle East. They are accompanied by their carrier air wings and include over 200 aircraft and 15,000 sailors and Marines. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部宣布，乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰已抵达美国中央司令部责任区。几十年来首次，三艘航空母舰——亚伯拉罕·林肯号、杰拉尔德·R·福特号和乔治·H·W·布什号——同时在中东地区行动。它们由各自的舰载机联队护航，包括超过200架飞机和15,000名水兵及海军陆战队员。 @wfwitness

text: Michael A. Horowitz RT @LucasFoxNews : “The chances of a catastrophic war increase the longer the U.S. fleet is stagnant while Beijing expands its naval power.” The Trump Administration has tossed its secretary of the Navy overboard. Will President Trump now seize perhaps his last opening to right the American fleet? https://on.wsj.com/4sOyyWx - Wall Street Journal Opinion tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 转推 @LucasFoxNews：“美国舰队停滞不前的时间越长，发生灾难性战争的可能性就越大，而北京正在扩张其海军力量。”特朗普政府已经解雇了海军部长。特朗普总统现在会抓住这或许是他纠正美国舰队的最后机会吗？ https://on.wsj.com/4sOyyWx - 华尔街日报评论推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @clemenswergin : Well, why should a special forces soldier be punished when he only does the same things as people close to the White House are doing, trading in insider information… Wow: A US special forces soldier involved in the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro was arrested for allegedly betting on that operation, netting him $400,000 in profits, according to a person familiar with the matter. https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/23/politics/us-special-forces-soldier-arrested-maduro-raid-trade - Natasha Bertrand tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @clemenswergin：好吧，为什么一名特种部队士兵在做着与白宫亲信同样的事情——利用内幕信息交易——时要受到惩罚呢…… 哇：据一位知情人士透露，一名参与抓捕委内瑞拉总统尼古拉斯·马杜罗的美国特种部队士兵因涉嫌在该行动中进行赌博并获利40万美元而被捕。 https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/23/politics/us-special-forces-soldier-arrested-maduro-raid-trade - Natasha Bertrand 推文

text: U.S. Central Command For the first time in decades, three aircraft carriers are operating in the Middle East at the same time. Accompanied by their carrier air wings, the USS Abraham Lincoln (CVN 72), USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN 78) and USS George H.W. Bush (CVN 77) include over 200 aircraft and 15,000 Sailors and Marines. tweet
text_zh: 美国中央司令部：几十年来首次，三艘航空母舰同时在中东地区行动。在舰载机联队的护航下，亚伯拉罕·林肯号（CVN 72）、杰拉尔德·R·福特号（CVN 78）和乔治·H·W·布什号（CVN 77）包括超过200架飞机和15,000名水兵及海军陆战队员。推文

text: Open Source Intel ICYMI Trump: Iran will have to stop funding Hezbollah to reach a deal with the US. This is big. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047614837585322162/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 错过的内容：特朗普：伊朗必须停止资助真主党才能与美国达成协议。这很重要。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047614837585322162/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to a release from the Kuwaiti Army, this morning, two fiber-optic wire-guided explosive drones targeted two sites in northern Kuwait. Per the release, the drones originated from Iraq and caused material damage but no injuries. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047614236113731597/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据科威特军队发布的消息，今天上午，两架光纤制导爆炸无人机袭击了科威特北部的两个地点。据发布的消息称，无人机来自伊拉克，造成了物质损失，但没有人员伤亡。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2047614236113731597/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IDF forces are erasing Hezbollah buildings in the Al-Khiyam area of southern Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047611797222408198/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列国防军部队正在抹平黎巴嫩南部希亚姆地区的真主党建筑。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047611797222408198/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel WATCH 🔴 Footage from Ben Gurion Airport appears to show a major buildup of U.S. KC-46 Pegasus and KC-135 Stratotanker refueling tankers on the ground. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047611495794512102/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 观看 🔴 本·古里安机场的画面似乎显示地面上有大量美国KC-46飞马座和KC-135同温层加油机集结。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047611495794512102/video/1 推文

text: Israel’s Bezalel Smotrich says Israel’s settlement push in the West Bank is being carried out with full support from the Trump Administration. He claims the policy is coordinated directly with Trump, Marco Rubio, and Mike Huckabee. Smotrich says this backing has enabled a major acceleration in settlement approvals and reduced international pressure compared to previous years. Source: The Jerusalem Post
text_zh: 以色列的贝扎雷尔·斯莫特里赫表示，以色列在西岸的定居点推进是在特朗普政府的全力支持下进行的。他声称该政策是直接与特朗普、马可·鲁比奥和迈克·赫卡比协调的。斯莫特里赫表示，这种支持使得定居点审批大幅加速，并减轻了与往年相比的国际压力。来源：《耶路撒冷邮报》

text: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Israeli media: Evacuation of a number of wounded from the Israeli army in southern Lebanon. Details to follow. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🌟 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列媒体：从黎巴嫩南部撤离了多名以色列军队伤员。详情后续。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | 推广

text: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 UAE Ambassador to the UK Mansoor Abulhoul stated on BBC radio that the UAE’s position remains clear: it seeks peace, but it must be a lasting and durable solution that addresses the full range of concerns across the region. The Strait of Hormuz remains critical to global stability; any threat risks wider economic disruption and sets a dangerous precedent beyond the region. The UAE continues to work closely with international partners, including the UK through the UN, to protect global trade routes. The country’s economy remains strong and resilient, with over $300 billion in foreign currency reserves and $2.5 trillion in sovereign wealth assets, well placed to withstand external pressures. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇦🇪 🇮🇷 阿联酋驻英国大使曼苏尔·阿布胡尔（Mansoor Abulhoul）在BBC广播电台表示，阿联酋的立场依然明确：寻求和平，但必须是能够解决整个地区所有关切的持久且稳固的解决方案。霍尔木兹海峡对全球稳定至关重要；任何威胁都有可能导致更广泛的经济动荡，并开创一个超越该地区的危险先例。阿联酋继续与包括英国在内的国际伙伴通过联合国密切合作，以保护全球贸易路线。该国经济依然强劲且具有韧性，拥有超过3000亿美元的外汇储备和2.5万亿美元的主权财富资产，完全有能力抵御外部压力。@wfwitness

text: 23-year-old Ezequiel Acuña, with no nuclear experience, was appointed to a high-level role at Argentina’s state nuclear company.
text_zh: 23岁的埃塞基耶尔·阿库尼亚（Ezequiel Acuña）在没有任何核能经验的情况下，被任命为阿根廷国家核能公司的高级职位。

text: 🇪🇺 Europe's gas prices could spike further as the EU bans spot purchases of Russian LNG starting Saturday. The move comes at the worst possible time, with the war in Iran having already sent regional gas prices up roughly 40%, and Europe needing to replenish depleted storage ahead of next winter. The spot ban could cut 2.8-3.5 million tonnes of Russian LNG annually, around 3% of the bloc's total LNG imports last year. Long-term contract flows continue until year's end. Russia still covers about 12% of EU gas needs, including pipeline supplies. The European Commission can declare an emergency and temporarily lift the ban if the situation deteriorates, but analysts at Energy Aspects say that's unlikely to happen fast given the reputational cost of reversing course so soon. The real crunch comes January 1, 2027, when long-term flows expire too. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 随着欧盟从周六起禁止现货购买俄罗斯液化天然气（LNG），欧洲天然气价格可能会进一步飙升。此举正值最糟糕的时刻，伊朗战争已经导致地区天然气价格上涨了约40%，而欧洲需要在明年冬天到来之前补充耗尽的库存。现货禁令每年可能会削减280万至350万吨俄罗斯液化天然气，约占该集团去年液化天然气进口总量的3%。长期合同供应将持续到今年年底。俄罗斯目前仍满足欧盟约12%的天然气需求，包括管道供应。如果局势恶化，欧盟委员会可以宣布进入紧急状态并暂时解除禁令，但Energy Aspects的分析师表示，考虑到如此迅速地改变方针所带来的声誉成本，这种情况不太可能很快发生。真正的危机将在2027年1月1日到来，届时长期供应合同也将到期。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Bloomberg : U.S. President Trump’s threats and social media posts, along with the US naval blockade, are hindering efforts to bring Iran back to peace talks. Tehran views the posts as humiliating, making it less inclined to strike a deal. Trump allies are divided: some want to prolong the blockade to squeeze Iran’s economy, while others argue that persistent disruption to the Strait of Hormuz risks deeper economic damage at home, with repercussions for mid‑term elections. Iran wants guarantees it will not be attacked again and some formal control over shipping through the strait. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 彭博社：美国总统特朗普的威胁和社交媒体帖子，连同美国的海军封锁，正在阻碍让伊朗重返和平谈判的努力。德黑兰认为这些帖子具有羞辱性，使其达成协议的意愿降低。特朗普的盟友们存在分歧：一些人希望延长封锁以挤压伊朗经济，而另一些人则认为，对霍尔木兹海峡的持续干扰可能会导致国内更严重的经济损害，并对中期选举产生影响。伊朗希望获得不会再次受到攻击的保证，并对通过海峡的航运拥有一定的正式控制权。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Reuters : Islamabad remains under a strict security lockdown for a second week, with authorities keeping key roads shut and the Red Zone sealed off in anticipation of a second round of US‑Iran peace talks that has yet to materialise. No talks are currently scheduled, but officials say they are ready for delegates to arrive at any moment. “Sometimes the government and media say that the delegations are coming, sometimes they say they aren’t,” one resident said. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 路透社：伊斯兰堡已连续第二周处于严格的安全封锁状态，当局关闭了主要道路并封锁了红区，以等待尚未实现的第二轮美伊和平谈判。目前尚未安排任何会谈，但官员们表示，他们随时准备迎接代表团的到来。“有时政府和媒体说代表团要来，有时又说不来了，”一位居民说。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇰🇼 Kuwaiti Army: Earlier today, 2 fiber-optic FPV drones launched from Iraq attacked border posts. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇰🇼 科威特军队：今天早些时候，2架从伊拉克发射的光纤FPV无人机袭击了边境哨所。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ : An Iranian‑flagged oil tanker, the Dorena, tried to slip past the US naval blockade by switching off its location signal, but was intercepted and escorted by a U.S. Navy destroyer off the west coast of India. Two other Iranian vessels, the Hero II and the Hedy, have also been stopped, and U.S. forces boarded a ship called Majestic X full of Iranian oil in the Indian Ocean. Since the blockade began, nearly three dozen vessels have been turned around. The U.S. has more than 17 warships and 100 aircraft in the region to enforce the blockade against Iran’s “shadow fleet” of sanctions‑evading tankers. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 华尔街日报：一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的油轮“多雷纳号”（Dorena）试图通过关闭定位信号来溜过美国的海军封锁，但在印度西海岸被一艘美国海军驱逐舰拦截并护送。另外两艘伊朗船只“英雄二号”（Hero II）和“海蒂号”（Hedy）也被拦截，美军还在印度洋登上一艘名为“雄伟X号”（Majestic X）的满载伊朗石油的船只。自封锁开始以来，已有近三打船只被遣返。美国在该地区部署了超过17艘军舰和100架飞机，以执行针对伊朗“影子船队”规避制裁油轮的封锁。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese MP Najat Saliba welcomed the three‑week extension of the Israel‑Lebanon ceasefire, telling the BBC that people will now have a chance to return home and “get going with their lives”. She said the Lebanese government is “very firm” about continuing discussions to find common ground and relieve people from bombings and killing, though she added that things are not expected to go “very smoothly”. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩议员纳贾特·萨利巴（Najat Saliba）对以色列与黎巴嫩停火协议延长三周表示欢迎，她告诉英国广播公司（BBC），人们现在有机会回家并“继续他们的生活”。她说，黎巴嫩政府在继续讨论以寻找共同点并使民众免受轰炸和杀戮方面态度“非常坚定”，尽管她补充说，预计事情不会“非常顺利”。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. War Secretary Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Dan Caine will hold a news conference at the Pentagon at 8am Eastern time to discuss developments in the war with Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）和参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩（Dan Caine）将军将于东部时间上午8点在五角大楼举行新闻发布会，讨论对伊战争的进展。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas warned that excluding nuclear experts from Iran peace talks could result in a weaker agreement than the 2015 JCPOA. Kallas also said that if broader issues – including missile programmes, support to proxies, and hybrid and cyber activities in Europe – are not addressed, “we will end up with a more dangerous Iran”. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 欧盟外交政策负责人卡娅·卡拉斯（Kaja Kallas）警告称，将核专家排除在伊朗和平谈判之外，可能会导致达成比2015年《联合全面行动计划》（JCPOA）更薄弱的协议。卡拉斯还表示，如果不解决更广泛的问题——包括导弹计划、对代理人的支持以及在欧洲的混合和网络活动——“我们最终将面对一个更危险的伊朗”。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN : U.S. military planners are developing new options to target Iran’s capabilities in the Strait of Hormuz if the current ceasefire collapses. Plans include “dynamic targeting” of Iran’s small fast attack boats, minelaying vessels and other asymmetric assets that have effectively shut down the waterway. Officials are also considering strikes on dual‑use infrastructure (energy facilities) and targeted killings of individual Iranian military leaders, including IRGC commander‑in‑chief Ahmad Vahidi, who officials say is undermining negotiations. While much of the initial bombing focused on targets away from the strait, a renewed campaign would concentrate on the strategic waterway. Despite the ceasefire, Iran has moved some remaining assets to new positions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN：如果目前的停火协议破裂，美国军事规划人员正在制定新的方案，以打击伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡的能力。计划包括对伊朗的小型快速攻击艇、布雷船和其他有效封锁了该水道的非对称资产进行“动态打击”。官员们还在考虑打击军民两用基础设施（能源设施）以及定点清除伊朗个别军事领导人，包括伊斯兰革命卫队总司令艾哈迈德·瓦希迪（Ahmad Vahidi），官员们称他正在破坏谈判。虽然最初的轰炸大部分集中在远离海峡的目标上，但新一轮行动将集中在这一战略水道上。尽管停火，伊朗还是将一些剩余资产转移到了新的位置。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel The US has three options on Iran right now: 1. Retreat to Iranian demands and lose all credibility built since the blockade began. 2. Stall and let the blockade continue bleeding the economy dry. 3. Resume the war. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美国目前对伊朗有三个选择：1. 向伊朗的要求退让，失去自封锁开始以来建立的所有信誉。2. 拖延时间，让封锁继续耗尽经济。3. 重启战争。推文

text: Open Source Intel This is Iran’s core dilemma now. Both choices threaten the regime. Option 1: Take the deal The economy needs it. The blockade is biting, the rial is collapsing, shortages are growing, salaries are delayed. But giving up the nuclear file means losing deterrence and weakening support from the IRGC hardliners. Option 2: Refuse the deal They keep ideological support and hardliner backing. But the economy keeps sinking. Within 3 months, losses near the full $56 billion annual budget. Unrest could spiral beyond control. Which way IRGC? tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 这就是伊朗目前的核心困境。两个选择都威胁到政权。选项1：接受协议。经济需要它。封锁正在加剧，里亚尔正在崩溃，短缺正在增加，工资被拖欠。但放弃核档案意味着失去威慑力，并削弱伊斯兰革命卫队强硬派的支持。选项2：拒绝协议。他们保持了意识形态的支持和强硬派的背书。但经济持续下滑。在3个月内，损失将接近560亿美元的年度预算总额。动荡可能失控。伊斯兰革命卫队会怎么选？推文

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi held separate phone calls with Pakistan’s Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar, and with Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir, to discuss regional developments and issues related to the ceasefire. The calls indicate that Pakistan continues its mediation efforts between Iran and the United States. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐（Abbas Araghchi）分别与巴基斯坦副总理兼外交部长伊沙克·达尔（Ishaq Dar）以及陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）元帅通电话，讨论地区局势发展及与停火相关的问题。这些通话表明，巴基斯坦继续在伊朗和美国之间进行斡旋。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 ☀️ Al-Akhbar: The integration of the Syrian Democratic Forces into Syria’s transitional government structures is facing multiple obstacles, according to a report. Key disputes include the incorporation of the Women’s Protection Units into the Defence Ministry – which the transitional authorities reject due to the Islamic character of the emerging army – as well as control over courts and prisons in SDF‑held areas. The SDF has proposed that Kurds receive at least half of the judgeships in Hasakah province, a proposal rejected by Damascus. Representation of Hasakah in the People’s Assembly and the management of border crossings are also disputed. The process remains slow despite continued meetings. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 ☀️ 《新闻报》（Al-Akhbar）：据一份报告显示，叙利亚民主军（SDF）融入叙利亚过渡政府结构的进程面临多重障碍。主要争议包括将妇女保护部队（YPJ）纳入国防部——过渡当局因新兴军队的伊斯兰性质而拒绝了这一提议——以及对叙利亚民主军控制区内法院和监狱的控制权。叙利亚民主军提议库尔德人在哈塞克省获得至少一半的法官职位，这一提议遭到了大马士革的拒绝。哈塞克在人民议会中的代表权以及边境口岸的管理权也存在争议。尽管会议仍在继续，但进程依然缓慢。@wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇵🇱 🤣 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇵🇱 🤣 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Nidaa al‑Watan : Lebanese Parliamentary Speaker Nabih Berri is privately supporting President Aoun and the government’s steps toward direct negotiations with Israel, despite maintaining public opposition. Berri is said to be deeply distressed over the destruction in southern Lebanon and the displacement of residents, blaming Hezbollah’s decision to fight the war – first in support of Gaza, then to avenge the assassination of Iran’s Supreme Leader – for dragging the Shia community into a disastrous conflict. The article claims Berri agreed to the condition of a ceasefire before negotiations (which Hezbollah rejected) and is kept informed of all Washington talks. He is described as being caught between the devastation of war, domestic and international rejection of Hezbollah’s policies, and the group’s unwillingness to change course. Berri reportedly sees direct negotiations as the only lifeline, fearing that if the war continues, internal conflict may erupt in Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Nidaa al‑Watan：黎巴嫩议会议长纳比·贝里私下支持奥恩总统和政府与以色列进行直接谈判的举措，尽管他在公开场合保持反对立场。据称，贝里对黎巴嫩南部的破坏和居民流离失所感到极度痛苦，他指责真主党发动战争的决定——先是为了支持加沙，后来是为了报复伊朗最高领袖遇刺——将什叶派社区拖入了一场灾难性的冲突。文章称，贝里同意了谈判前停火的条件（真主党拒绝了该条件），并随时了解华盛顿的所有会谈情况。他被描述为夹在战争的破坏、国内外对真主党政策的抵制以及该组织不愿改变方针之间。据报道，贝里将直接谈判视为唯一的生命线，担心如果战争继续下去，黎巴嫩可能会爆发内部冲突。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NYT : The Iran war has significantly drained critical U.S. munitions stockpiles, leaving US forces less ready for potential conflicts with Russia or China, according to Pentagon and congressional officials. The U.S. has used approximately 1,100 long-range JASSM‑ER cruise missiles (out of a total inventory of around 2,600), over 1,000 Tomahawk missiles, more than 1,200 Patriot interceptors, and over 1,000 Precision Strike and ATACMS missiles. The cost of the 38‑day war before the ceasefire is estimated at between $28 billion and $35 billion – roughly $1 billion per day. In the first two days alone, the military expended $5.6 billion in munitions. The Pentagon is awaiting congressional funding to replenish supplies, and defence manufacturers have not yet begun expanded production despite long‑term agreements. Patriot and THAAD interceptors have been redirected from Asia, including from South Korea, to the Middle East. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《纽约时报》：据五角大楼和国会官员称，伊朗战争严重消耗了美国关键的弹药储备，导致美军在应对与俄罗斯或中国潜在冲突时的准备能力下降。美国已经使用了约1100枚远程JASSM‑ER巡航导弹（总库存约2600枚）、超过1000枚战斧导弹、超过1200枚爱国者拦截导弹以及超过1000枚精确打击导弹和陆军战术导弹系统（ATACMS）。停火前38天战争的成本估计在280亿至350亿美元之间——平均每天约10亿美元。仅在头两天，军方就消耗了56亿美元的弹药。五角大楼正在等待国会拨款以补充库存，尽管有长期协议，但国防制造商尚未开始扩大生产。爱国者和萨德拦截导弹已从包括韩国在内的亚洲地区被重新部署到中东。 @wfwitness

text: 📝 Украинцы и тут отметились 📝 о полетах Ан-124 в Карибском бассейне Украинцы и Гаити – казалось бы, какой может быть связь. Но даже в вопросе кризиса на Гаити, где на протяжении последних месяцев ситуация стала критической, нашлось месту для «украинского следа» на островном государстве (подробнее об обстановке можно почитать на ЛАТИНАРЕ ) . 🖍 С самого начала апреля в Карибском бассейне началась фиксация полетов украинских тяжелых транспортных самолетов Ан-124, которые делали подозрительные рейсы то на Гаити , то на Барбадос . И длилось это примерно до 20 апреля. 🚩 Полеты они совершали с территории Африки. Основной точкой вылета был Чад. Также были остановки в Камеруне и Сенегале. И за апрель месяц практически появился коридор из Африки до Карибского бассейна, где Сенегал, Камерун и Барбадос стали транзитными точками. 🏳️ Целью полетов стала переброска чадских миротворцев, которых привлекли для стабилизации обстановки в Гаити. Инициатива с широким мандатом «Сил подавления» была утверждена в начале апреля, после чего сразу же и начались полеты украинских транспортников. ❗️ Ближайший месяц в островном государстве будет определяющий, так как только к концу апреля подразделения из Африки начнут свою активную операцию по борьбе с бандформированиями, и это как минимум приведет к новой волне хаоса в Гаити. А украинская коммерческая авиация так и продолжает работать в интересах других государств. Дефицитный тяжелый транспортный флот с туманной юридической привязкой делает его идеальным для «грязных задач» вроде миссий на Карибах или же в Африке . 📍 Инфографика в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Versión en español #Гаити #разбор #Украина #Чад ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 乌克兰人也在这里留下了印记 📝 关于安-124在加勒比海地区的飞行。乌克兰人和海地——看起来似乎没什么联系。但即使在海地危机的问题上，过去几个月海地局势变得危急，在这个岛国也发现了“乌克兰痕迹”（关于局势的详细信息可以在LATINARE上阅读）。 🖍 从四月初开始，加勒比海地区开始记录到乌克兰安-124重型运输机的飞行，它们进行了可疑的飞行，有时去海地，有时去巴巴多斯。这种情况一直持续到4月20日左右。 🚩 它们是从非洲领土起飞的。主要的起飞点是乍得。此外，还在喀麦隆和塞内加尔进行了停留。在四月份，几乎形成了一条从非洲到加勒比海的走廊，塞内加尔、喀麦隆和巴巴多斯成为了中转站。 🏳️ 飞行的目的是运送乍得维和人员，他们被招募来稳定海地的局势。具有广泛“镇压部队”授权的倡议在四月初获得批准，随后乌克兰运输机的飞行立即开始。 ❗️ 未来一个月对这个岛国来说将是决定性的，因为只有到四月底，来自非洲的部队才会开始其打击武装团伙的积极行动，这至少会导致海地出现新一轮的混乱。而乌克兰的商业航空继续为其他国家的利益服务。稀缺的重型运输机队及其模糊的法律归属，使其成为执行加勒比或非洲任务等“肮脏工作”的理想选择。 📍 高分辨率信息图 📍 英文版 📍 西班牙语版 #海地 #分析 #乌克兰 #乍得 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: 🔄 Forwarded from China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong: *Join Danny Haiphong LIVE today April 24th 1pm CET 7am eastern with Victor Gao ! The renowned Chinese commentator joins Danny Haiphong live in Beijing to discuss China’s position in the US war on Iran and he and China’s reactions and moves geopolitically in an era of desperate and dangerous US empire. What role has China played in the war really? What is its actual position on the Strait of Hormuz? And is Trump gearing up to confront China? All of this and more on the stream here: https://www.youtube.com/live/-rWKtvXyuaI?si=Fn7M4v3Huavo2eQ3
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 China and Geopolitics with Danny Haiphong：*今天4月24日欧洲中部时间下午1点（美东时间上午7点），加入Danny Haiphong的直播，嘉宾是高志凯！这位著名的中国评论员将与Danny Haiphong在北京进行直播，讨论中国在美国对伊朗战争中的立场，以及他在绝望而危险的美国帝国时代对地缘政治的反应和举措。中国在战争中到底扮演了什么角色？它在霍尔木兹海峡的实际立场是什么？特朗普是否正在准备对抗中国？所有这些以及更多内容，请点击此处观看直播：https://www.youtube.com/live/-rWKtvXyuaI?si=Fn7M4v3Huavo2eQ3

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇸🇦 Asharq Al-Awsat : Lebanese Foreign Minister Youssef Rajji said Lebanon has begun gradually regaining its right to decide its fate independently. “The Lebanese state alone is the decision‑maker in negotiation. Lebanon is not subordinate to anyone nor a pawn in any axis. There is no shame in negotiating with Israel if the goal is to end the war and regain land,” he stated. Rajji criticised Hezbollah for gambling with the fate of southern villages and called for the state to monopolise weapons. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇸🇦 《中东报》：黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·拉吉表示，黎巴嫩已开始逐步恢复独立决定其命运的权利。“黎巴嫩国家是谈判中唯一的决策者。黎巴嫩不从属于任何人，也不是任何轴心的棋子。如果目标是结束战争和收复领土，与以色列谈判并不丢人，”他说道。拉吉批评真主党拿南部村庄的命运进行赌博，并呼吁国家垄断武器。@wfwitness

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Ukraine's Azov drone operators hunting down Russian air defense mobile groups with OWA-UAVs around Russia-controlled city of Donetsk in eastern Ukraine. During night-time operations, turning on searchlights often turns out to be a grave mistake for the Russians as it allows the Ukrainians to guide their real-time-operated strike drones onto the target. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）乌克兰亚速营无人机操作员正在乌克兰东部俄罗斯控制的顿涅茨克市周边，利用单向攻击无人机（OWA-UAV）猎杀俄罗斯防空机动小组。在夜间行动中，开启探照灯对俄军来说往往是一个严重的错误，因为这让乌克兰人能够引导其实时操作的打击无人机命中目标。推文

text: Nuno Felix In the real world France voted against the suspension of the EU-Israel Association Agreement in the EU Council….. but Albania State TV keeps pushing its BS This is not about the Palestinians. This is about Israel pushing France out of the talks with Lebanon - Jonathan Schanzer tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 在现实世界中，法国在欧盟理事会投票反对暂停《欧盟-以色列联系国协定》……但阿尔巴尼亚国家电视台仍在散布其胡言乱语。这与巴勒斯坦人无关。这是关于以色列将法国挤出与黎巴嫩的谈判——乔纳森·尚泽尔（Jonathan Schanzer）推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @gideonrachman : Yes; I heard in Washington that the US intends to punish its NATO allies once the Iran war is over. Who knows when that will be, however? In the meantime they need Ramstein, Lakenheath etc SCOOP! Internal Pentagon email details options to punish NATO allies who the US believes failed to support it in Iran war operations. Will post a link to my story later but US official says the options include: * Suspending Spain from NATO alliance. * Reassessing US diplomatic support for European "imperial possessions," to include Britain's claim to the Falkland Islands near Argentina * Suspending "difficult" countries from important or prestigious positions at NATO * No option to close U.S. bases in the email * No option for withdrawing U.S. from the alliance in the email - Phil Stewart tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @gideonrachman：是的；我在华盛顿听说，美国打算在伊朗战争结束后惩罚其北约盟国。然而，谁知道那会是什么时候呢？在此期间，他们需要拉姆施泰因、莱肯希思等基地。独家新闻！五角大楼内部邮件详细列出了惩罚美国认为在伊朗战争行动中未能提供支持的北约盟国的选项。我稍后会发布我的报道链接，但美国官员表示，这些选项包括：* 将西班牙从北约联盟中停职。* 重新评估美国对欧洲“帝国属地”的外交支持，包括英国对阿根廷附近马尔维纳斯群岛（福克兰群岛）的主权主张。* 将“麻烦”国家从北约的重要或显赫职位上停职。* 邮件中没有关闭美国基地的选项。* 邮件中没有美国退出联盟的选项——菲尔·斯图尔特（Phil Stewart）推文

text: Faytuks News RT @netblocks : #⃣ It's now the 56th day of #Iran 's internet blackout, with international connectivity severed for over 1320 hours. The measure, the longest recorded national internet shutdown in a connected society, continues while conditions deteriorate amid warfare and reported executions. https://twitter.com/netblocks/status/2047580728154542466/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 转推 @netblocks：#⃣ 这是伊朗互联网封锁的第56天，国际连接已中断超过1320小时。这一措施是互联社会中记录在案的最长国家级互联网关闭，在战争和据报道的处决导致局势恶化的同时仍在持续。https://twitter.com/netblocks/status/2047580728154542466/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇷🇺 ➡️ 🇱🇹 🇱🇻 🇪🇪 Poland’s Prime Minister warned that Russia could potentially attack the Baltic states within months, while raising concerns about whether the U.S. would intervene. 🇵🇱 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 Donald Tusk told the Financial Times that Europe’s key question is whether the United States remains as committed to NATO obligations as outlined in the alliance’s treaties. He cautioned that Russia could target a NATO member “within months.” 🔹 His remarks came during an EU summit in Cyprus, where leaders are discussing the bloc’s mutual defense clause (Article 42.7), partly in response to Donald Trump’s rhetoric about NATO and ambiguity surrounding Article 5 commitments. 📌 “I want to believe that Article 5 is still in force, but sometimes doubts arise. I don’t want to be overly pessimistic… but we need a practical context today. The issue is not the level of Poland–U.S. relations, but how these ties would function in the face of a real threat,” Tusk said. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇷🇺 ➡️ 🇱🇹 🇱🇻 🇪🇪 波兰总理警告称，俄罗斯可能在几个月内袭击波罗的海国家，同时对美国是否会干预表示担忧。🇵🇱 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 唐纳德·图斯克告诉《金融时报》，欧洲的关键问题是美国是否仍然像联盟条约中所述那样致力于北约义务。他警告说，俄罗斯可能“在几个月内”将目标对准北约成员国。🔹 他的言论是在塞浦路斯举行的欧盟峰会上发表的，各国领导人正在讨论该集团的共同防御条款（第42.7条），部分原因是回应唐纳德·特朗普关于北约的言论以及围绕第5条承诺的模糊性。📌 “我想相信第5条仍然有效，但有时会产生怀疑。我不想过于悲观……但我们今天需要一个实际的背景。问题不在于波兰与美国关系的水平，而在于这些关系在面对真正威胁时将如何运作，”图斯克说。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文
